articles.author: Gregorio Sorgi
articles.title: Hungary’s Tisza party widens parliamentary majority as final votes are counted - politico.eu
articles.description: Incoming Prime Minister Péter Magyar held talks with the European Commission to unfreeze EU funds.
articles.content:
Orbáns Fidesz party came in a distant second with only 52 seats in the parliament.
Here are the results of the 2026 parliamentary election: an unprecedented majority, an unprecedented mandate and, a… [+1572 chars]
